title: alyssum repens subsp. ramosum
intro: Alyssum repens subsp. ramosum, also known as Creeping Alyssum, is a flowering plant species belonging to the Brassicaceae family. Traditionally, Alyssum repens subsp. ramosum has been used for its medicinal properties, including its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties, which are attributed to the presence of compounds like isothiocyanates. The plant is said to offer various health benefits, such as reducing inflammation, promoting wound healing, and exhibiting antimicrobial activity, although more research is needed to confirm these effects. Alyssum repens subsp. ramosum can be used in herbal preparations like teas, tinctures, and infusions, although its usage and preparation methods should be approached with caution and under the guidance of a healthcare professional.
